creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://docs.freebsd.org/cgi/getmsg.cgi?fetch=183038+0+current/freebsd-hackers> for example, the HTML title is: 

> FreeBSD Mail Archives

– should be: 

> Call for Foundation-supported Project Ideas

Compare with the titles, which match or begin with, the subject line, at <https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-hackers/2021-November/000394.html> and <https://marc.info/?l=freebsd-hackers&m=163770725102781&w=2>.
